reference: Hello, I have a pain in my tongue. I believe it is the tongue muscle, but I can't be sure. When I press my tongue against the roof of my mouth, I feel the pain under my chin. Moving my tongue in general causes pain in the tongue. If I press my thumbs under my chin where the tongue muscle is, I can massage it a little to relieve the pain, but it is still there. It is a dull pain at this point. There is no swelling. It just hurts when I move my tongue to speak or swallow.
text: Hello, I have a pain in my tongue. I believe it is the tongue muscle, but I can't be sure. When I press my tongue against the roof of my mouth, I feel the pain under my chin. Moving my tongue in general causes pain in the tongue. If I press my thumbs under my chin where tongue muscle is, I can massage it a little to relieve the pain. But it is still there. It is a dull pain at this point. There is no swelling. It just hurts when I move my tongue to speak or swallow.
